name: Dee's Spicy Veggie Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 2 Or 3 red, yellow or green bell peppers, in 2-inch pieces
1/2 cup butter, margarine, or olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Husk and wash corn. Cut each ear into 3 or 4 pieces. Place in foil and grill for 10 minutes. (Alternatively, parboil until almost cooked.)
2. Peel and wash carrots. Slice on the diagonal to create 1/2-inch "planks." Place in foil with water and grill for 10 minutes. (Alternatively, parboil until not quite tender crisp.)
3. Wash potatoes, place in foil with water, and grill.
4. Clean and cut remaining vegetables. Place them in a ziplock bag with melted butter and taco seasoning mix.
5. After corn, carrots, and potatoes have cooked for 10 minutes, quickly thread all vegetables onto skewers. Return to the grill and cook for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
6. Brush kabobs with any remaining seasoning before serving. Optionally, try using Italian dressing, lemon pepper seasoning, basil herb butter, dry ranch dressing, Cajun or cayenne butter.
